blocks.label: Overhead Sectional Doors

variables.label: Model
variables.delegateText: Propose a door for the opening and thermal requirements.
variables.altText: Offer alternative door type with U-value, wind class and price differences.

variables.label: Rail system
variables.altText: Quote standard and high lift with headroom and price difference.

blocks.label: Dock Levellers
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall supply hydraulic dock levellers:

Model: {{dockMod}}, Quantity: {{dockQty}}
Platform: {{dockW}} × {{dockL}} mm
Capacity: min {{dockCap}} kg
Operation: {{dockOp}}

Mandatory: automatic lip, wheel guides, safety struts, maintenance strut, CE marking.

The Supplier shall confirm: type, dynamic load capacity, pit dimensions, cycle rating, speed, CE/DoP, weight.

STM reserves the right to reject non-compliant alternatives.

variables.label: Model
variables.delegateText: Propose dock leveller for specified capacity.

blocks.label: Controls & Accessories
Standards
blocks.text:
All products shall comply with at minimum:

- EN 13241 (industrial, commercial, garage doors — performance)
- EN 12604 (mechanical aspects)
- EN 12453 (safety in use of power operated doors)
- EN 12978 (safety devices)

Performance classes:
- Wind resistance: min Class {{windCl}} per EN 12424
- Water tightness: min Class {{waterCl}} per EN 12425
- Air permeability: min Class {{airCl}} per EN 12426

Thermal performance:
- U-value panel: max {{uPan}} W/m²K
- U-value complete door: max {{uDoor}} W/m²K

Dock levellers (if in scope): EN 1398. Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC.

Attach: DoP, performance test reports, wiring diagrams, installation requirements.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per door — itemise separately:
- Door body (panels, frame, seals)
- Rail system
- Motor and drive unit
- Control panel and cabling
- Wicket door (if applicable)
- Glazing (if applicable)

Per dock leveller: complete unit
Transport: per delivery

Validity: minimum {{validityDays}} days.
State if prices subject to material index.

Payment: {{paymentDays}} days after invoice.

Surcharges not stated are deemed included and cannot be invoiced separately.
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Non-standard colour (outside standard RAL range)
- Non-standard dimensions (outside standard production range)
- Spare parts package
- Extended warranty beyond standard
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
Excluded (procured separately by STM):

- Installation and commissioning
- Steel substructure and lintels
- Electrical supply to junction box / distribution board
- Builder's work (floor threshold, frame reveal)
- Crane and lifting equipment
- Scaffolding
- Fire sealing at door reveals
- VAT

Supplier shall state additional exclusions. Items not listed and not excluded by Supplier are deemed included.

Installation instructions and documentation provided at no additional cost.
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
Submit to {{stmContact}} at {{stmEmail}} before {{deadline}}.

Include:
1. Price schedule itemised per door (body, rail, motor, control, wicket, glazing)
2. Data sheets per product
3. DoP + CE certificate
4. Performance test reports (wind, water, air class; U-values)
5. Wiring diagrams
6. Installation requirements (headroom, sideroom, lintel dimensions)
7. Lead time after order confirmation
8. Warranty statement
9. General terms and conditions
10. All deviations and assumptions with justification

Incomplete quotations may be rejected.
STM is not obligated to award to lowest bidder.
This RFQ does not constitute a commitment to order.
